Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Michael Casey Walker, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kiyoko Matzuki, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence and declarations presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Janet Hisake Thompson, amount to be determined, matter under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.

Nov. 4, 2004
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $25,486.91
Interest at the rate of 10% per ammum from the date of entry of Judgment.
Costs $467.50, for a total of $25,954.41
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
